meta.title: Hot New Gameshow: My Favorite Metric!
meta.description:
Contestants have 3 minutes to present their favorite OT cyber risk metric before a panel of "celebrity" judges. The winner gets fame, glory, and $2,000. Second prize is $500. 

Our celebrity judges are:

John Ballentine
Kyle McMillan
Maggie Morganti

Subscribe to Dale’s ICS Security: Friday News & Notes email here:
https://friday.dale-peterson.com/signup
Check out S4x26. Feb 23 - 26 in Miami South Beach:
https://s4xevents.com
